description: Client methods: Added `parallelStart()` and `parallelPoll()` to `StratumMcpClient` for server-side dispatch. Methods convert camelCase args to snake_case, call stratum MCP tools, parse JSON responses. Reuse existing `parallelDone()` pattern. 2 new tests.
phase: T2-F5-COMPOSE-MIGRATE: Server-Side Dispatch for All Parallel Steps
